source_intake_record.raw_question_text:
Hint: Please answer the question and provide the correct option letter, e.g., A, B, C, D, at the end.
Question: A programmable logic array (PLA) is shown in <image>.

The Boolean function \( F \) implemented is:  
Choices  
A. \( \bar{P} \bar{Q} R + \bar{P} Q R + P \bar{Q} \bar{R} \)  
B. \( (\bar{P} + \bar{Q} + R)(\bar{P} + Q + R)(P + \bar{Q} + \bar{R}) \)  
C. \( \bar{P} \bar{Q} R + \bar{P} Q R + P \bar{Q} R \)  
D. \( (\bar{P} + \bar{Q} + R)(\bar{P} + Q + R)(P + \bar{Q} + R) \)
